topics.label: Space Domain Awareness (SDA) & Object Characterization
topics.hint: Unresolved spectroscopy • photometry/light curves • simulation datasets
topics.description: Deep learning and simulation-driven workflows for characterizing GEO satellites and rocket bodies from unresolved measurements (spectroscopy, photometry/light curves) with an emphasis on realistic validation and operator-relevant outputs.

topics.label: Radiation Sensing & Machine Learning Methods
topics.hint: Gamma-ray spectra • novelty detection • sparse imaging • estimation
topics.description: Machine learning for gamma-ray spectral analysis and sparse radiation imaging, including novelty detection/localization, compressed sensing / sparse reconstruction, and estimation-oriented ML methods (including mixture proportion estimation).

topics.label: Computational Imaging & Document Restoration
topics.hint: Photometric correction • geometry-aware restoration • material/ink identification
topics.description: Vision and imaging methods for document capture, photometric correction, geometric restoration, and material/ink identification.

topics.label: Cultural Heritage Digitization & 3D Documentation
topics.hint: Petroglyphs/rock art • museum digitization • digital libraries
topics.description: Work at the intersection of sensing, 3D documentation, and digital heritage workflows (petroglyphs/rock art, museum digitization, and related digital-library applications).

topics.label: Immersive Media, Audio/VR & Game Development
topics.hint: Spatial audio • VR environments • applied development
topics.description: Immersive applications and development practices spanning spatial audio, VR environments, and teaching-focused production workflows.

topics.label: Other
topics.description: Items that don’t cleanly fit the primary research threads (e.g., patents, security/authentication, short articles).
